# Uni & Salmon - 海膽三文魚 (Full Documentation)

> Hong Kong and Macau's leading supplier of premium sea urchin (uni / 海膽) and salmon (三文魚).

## Company Overview

We are the representative company for the sea urchin and salmon industry in Hong Kong and Macau. Our mission is to be the definitive source for premium uni and salmon products in the Greater Bay Area, connecting the world's best fisheries with discerning buyers.

## Sea Urchin (海膽 / Uni) — Comprehensive Guide

### What is Sea Urchin?
Sea urchin, known as "uni" (雲丹) in Japanese cuisine and "海膽" in Chinese, refers to the edible gonads of the sea urchin. It is one of the most prized delicacies in East Asian cuisine, particularly valued in Hong Kong and Macau's dining scene.

### Varieties We Supply

#### Japanese Bafun Uni (馬糞海膽)
- **Origin**: Hokkaido, Japan
- **Season**: Peak season June–August
- **Flavor profile**: Rich, creamy, intensely sweet with umami depth
- **Best for**: Sashimi, sushi nigiri, premium donburi
- **Grade**: We supply A and AA grades

#### Japanese Murasaki Uni (紫海膽)
- **Origin**: Various regions of Japan
- **Season**: Year-round with seasonal variation
- **Flavor profile**: Delicate, light brininess, clean ocean taste
- **Best for**: Sashimi, fine dining preparations
- **Grade**: We supply premium grades

#### Canadian Red Sea Urchin
- **Origin**: British Columbia, Canada
- **Season**: Peak October–May
- **Flavor profile**: Large lobes, bold flavor, buttery texture
- **Best for**: Sashimi, fusion cuisine, Western fine dining
- **Grade**: Premium export grade

### Sea Urchin Quality Grading
- **AA Grade**: Perfect color, firm texture, no blemishes — the finest available
- **A Grade**: Excellent quality, minor variations — ideal for high-end restaurants
- **B Grade**: Good quality — suitable for cooking and processed products

### Storage and Handling
- Fresh uni should be kept at 0–2°C
- Consume within 2–3 days of delivery for optimal freshness
- Never freeze fresh uni — texture degrades significantly

## Salmon (三文魚) — Comprehensive Guide

### Salmon in Hong Kong & Macau
Salmon is the most consumed sashimi fish in Hong Kong and Macau. The market demands consistently high quality for both raw consumption and cooking applications.

### Varieties We Supply

#### Atlantic Salmon (大西洋三文魚)
- **Origin**: Norway, Scotland, Faroe Islands
- **Characteristics**: Mild flavor, consistent quality, good fat marbling
- **Best for**: Sashimi, sushi, grilling, smoking
- **Our supply**: Year-round, air-freighted 2-3 times weekly

#### King Salmon / Chinook (帝王三文魚)
- **Origin**: New Zealand, Alaska, British Columbia
- **Characteristics**: Highest oil content, rich buttery flavor, large flakes
- **Best for**: Premium sashimi, high-end restaurants
- **Our supply**: Seasonal availability

#### Sockeye Salmon (紅三文魚)
- **Origin**: Alaska, British Columbia
- **Characteristics**: Deep red flesh, firm texture, robust flavor
- **Best for**: Grilling, smoking, visual presentation
- **Our supply**: Seasonal (May–September peak)

### Salmon Quality Standards
- **Sashimi-grade**: Meets strict freshness, handling, and temperature chain requirements for raw consumption
- **Premium cooking-grade**: Excellent for all cooked preparations
- All our salmon undergoes rigorous quality control and cold chain management

## Hong Kong & Macau Market Insights

### Market Size
Hong Kong and Macau represent one of Asia's most important markets for premium seafood, with high per-capita consumption of both sea urchin and salmon.

### Key Channels
- Fine dining and Japanese restaurants (omakase, sushi bars)
- Hotel food & beverage operations
- Premium supermarkets and specialty food stores
- Online fresh food platforms
- Catering and events companies

### Trends
- Growing demand for traceable, sustainably sourced seafood
- Increasing interest in premium Japanese uni varieties
- Rise of direct-to-consumer channels for premium seafood
- Year-round availability expectations from consumers

## Why Choose Us

1. **Direct sourcing relationships** with fisheries in Japan, Canada, Norway, and more
2. **Rigorous quality control** at every stage of the supply chain
3. **Reliable logistics** — air-freight delivery ensuring maximum freshness
4. **Deep market knowledge** of Hong Kong and Macau seafood industry
5. **Bilingual service** in Chinese and English
6. **Flexible ordering** — wholesale and retail volumes available

## Contact & Inquiries

For wholesale pricing, product catalogs, or partnership inquiries, please visit our website or contact us directly. We serve all of Hong Kong and Macau.
